description: Create a content slide on J.P. Morgan Asset Management as a diversified $4.3T active manager using a sidebar-right layout with two donut charts, KPI highlight boxes, regional revenue split KPIs, and a right-hand accolades list.

header.headline: J.P. Morgan Asset Management: Broad, diversified $4.3T active manager
header.sub: The power of perspective to build stronger portfolios

main.title: Assets under supervision ($B)
main.body:
By Asset Class: Fixed Income $997; Alternatives $220; Equities $1,223; Liquidity $1,584; Solutions $530; total $4.3T.

By Client Segment: Financial Intermediaries $1,864; Liquidity $1,406; Institutional $1,055; total $4.3T.

Research and coverage highlights: Annual research budget $525M+; 70+ investment engines; 55% of largest pensions / SWFs as clients; >70% coverage of industry assets.

Revenue diversified across regions: Americas 67%; EMEA 23%; APAC 10%.

items.text: Top 2 U.S. core real estate manager
83% LT fund AUM outperforming peer median

footer.source: Footnotes and sources referenced on slide
